Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 27}Jamming is a support skill that {f 0 1 2}makes you undetectable to enemies{f 0 1 27}. Use it when you're running low on HP or when you want to pick up treasure chests without being detected.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Jamming is {f 0 1 2}ineffective against certain enemies{f 0 1 27}, and will be disabled once you {f 0 1 2}enter combat or change floors{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
